questions.question: Describe the key differences between the fork() and vfork() system calls. How do these differences impact the parent and child processes?
Explain how shared memory can be used in a client-server application to improve communication efficiency. Provide an example of how to use shared memory in a C program.

A C program is designed to handle multiple client requests concurrently. Explain how to pass file descriptors from the main process to child processes using pipes or sockets. Provide an example code snippet to demonstrate this concept.
